home.whatCanIDo: What can I do for you today?

learnMoreModal.title: Generate Creative Images
learnMoreModal.featureDescription: Swap between AI brains like Nano Banana Pro, GPT Image 1.5, and more. Each model hits different—pick the vibe that fits your idea best.

items.title: Multiple Models
items.description: Swap between AI brains like Nano Banana Pro, GPT Image 1.5, and more. Each model hits different—pick the vibe that fits your idea best.

items.title: Various Styles
items.description: From Starry to Pixel, 3D, Realistic, Clay, and beyond. One idea, infinite aesthetics. Try them all.

items.title: Creative Tools
items.description: Glow up your images: group photos, background swaps, hairstyle changes, photo restore, easy. Big edits, tiny effort.

items.title: Advanced Mode
items.description: Lock subject, scene, or style for clean, consistent results. Perfect for characters, series, and brand-level drip.

videoItems.title: Start Frame / End Frame
videoItems.description: Swap between AI brains like Nano Banana Pro, GPT Image 1.5, and more. Each model hits different—pick the vibe that fits your idea best.

videoItems.title: Reference Images
videoItems.description: From Starry to Pixel, 3D, Realistic, Clay, and beyond. One idea, infinite aesthetics. Try them all.

storybookItems.title: Multiple Generate Models
storybookItems.description: Switch between powerful AI models like Nano Banana Pro, GPT Image 1.5, and more. Each model hits different—pick your storyteller.

storybookItems.title: Various Styles
storybookItems.description: From Clay / Stop Motion to Fabric, Ghibli-inspired, Oil Painting, and Magic Flow. Every story gets its own visual soul.

storybookItems.title: Various Genres
storybookItems.description: Go fun & playful, dive into classic horror, punch through superhero action, or unravel noir detective vibes. Your story, your mood.

storybookItems.title: Voice Over
storybookItems.description: Turn pages into sound with expressive AI narration. Perfect for kids, storytelling, or hands-free listening.

storybookItems.title: Background Music
storybookItems.description: Set the mood with cinematic background music. Soft, dark, epic, or cozy—your story feels alive.

storybookItems.title: Rich Dialogue (Novel Mode)
storybookItems.description: Deep conversations, inner thoughts, plot twists. Reads like a novel. Feels like a story.

storybookItems.title: Multiple Languages
storybookItems.description: Tell your story in many languages, instantly. One world, unlimited readers.

storybookItems.title: Text Included
storybookItems.description: Text appears on the page or as separate story panels. Clean layouts, easy reading, full control.

storybookItems.title: Manga Layout
storybookItems.description: Dynamic panels, expressive speech bubbles, and bold sound effects. Pure manga energy—page after page.

builtin.title: Built-in Skills
builtin.subtitle: Pre-installed skills that enhance agent capabilities

empty.title: No custom skills added yet
empty.description: Click "{{action}}" to add skills from GitHub

connect.title: Connect Skill from GitHub
connect.description: Add a custom skill from a GitHub repository. The skill folder must contain a SKILL.md file with valid frontmatter.

whatAreSkills.title: What are Skills?
whatAreSkills.content: Skills are folders containing a SKILL.md file that instruct the Agent how to complete specific tasks. They provide specialized knowledge, workflows, and tool integrations for tasks like document processing, design work, or coding patterns.

whereToFind.title: Where to Find Skills
whereToFind.content: The official Anthropic skills repository contains ready-to-use skills. You can also find community skills on GitHub or create your own.

howToGetUrl.title: How to Get the Tree URL
howToGetUrl.step1: 1. Go to the GitHub repository containing the skill
howToGetUrl.step2: 2. Navigate to the folder containing the SKILL.md file
howToGetUrl.step3: 3. Copy the URL from your browser's address bar
howToGetUrl.tip: Tip: The URL should point to the folder, not the SKILL.md file itself.

toasts.connectFailed: Failed to connect skill from GitHub

help.title: What are Skills?
help.description: Skills are folders of instructions, scripts, and resources that the Agent loads dynamically to improve performance on specialized tasks.

whatAreSkills.title: What are Skills?
whatAreSkills.content: Skills instruct Agent how to complete specific tasks in a repeatable way, such as creating documents with brand guidelines, analyzing data using specific workflows, or automating tasks. Each skill contains a SKILL.md file with instructions and guidance.

whereToFind.title: Where to Find Skills
whereToFind.content: Browse official skills at github.com/anthropics/skills. You can also find community skills or create your own. Any GitHub repository with a valid SKILL.md file can be connected.
